name: refactor
description: Refactor a component with safety: tests first, then change, then verify

tasks.name: audit-{component_name}
tasks.instruction: Read all files in {component_name}. Document: current structure, dependencies, test coverage, known issues. Record architectural decisions about why refactoring is needed.

tasks.name: ensure-tests-{component_name}
tasks.instruction: Check existing tests for {component_name}. Add tests for any untested critical paths. These tests must pass BEFORE and AFTER the refactor to ensure no regressions.

tasks.name: refactor-{component_name}
tasks.instruction: Refactor {component_name} to achieve: {refactor_goal}. Make incremental changes. Run tests after each significant change. Record all decisions.

tasks.name: verify-{component_name}
tasks.instruction: Run full test suite. Check that all pre-existing tests still pass. Verify that the refactoring achieved {refactor_goal}. Run linter and type checker.
